final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese annotated infographic for 中国少数民族服饰, structured as a scholarly 文博 reference plate with a full-body realistic central figure and systematic exploded-view annotation panels.

Style/medium: needs a "国家博物馆展板 / 历史服饰图鉴 / 文博专题信息图" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 故宫博物院文物图录 print tradition, 中国国家博物馆 exhibition panel design language, 《中国少数民族服饰文化》学术图鉴 editorial layout; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must follow this fixed layout — top band: 中文主标题 + 副标题 + 导语; left column: structural exploded-view with 中文引线标注 of key components + close-up detail insets; upper-right panel: 材质 / 工艺 / 质感 swatches with 中文 captions; mid-right panel: 纹样 / 色彩 / 寓意 section with primary color palette chips, pattern samples, and cultural interpretation text; bottom band: 穿着顺序 / 构成流程图 + 核心特征总结
Subject: must include a realistic full-body standing-pose figure wearing a complete 中国少数民族 festive or ceremonial costume — model selection, ethnic group, garment system, key components, construction details, and era style are to be determined by the model for maximum representational richness
Scene/backdrop: must use a paper-texture background in 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 tones, matte and archival in quality
Lighting/mood: needs a flat, even, scholarly-archival illumination — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a restrained, high-register palette anchored to the chosen ethnic costume's authentic colors, with muted background tones; exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: must include realistic textile swatch insets showing authentic fabric grain, embroidery texture, and weave structure for the featured garment's key materials
Text (verbatim): must include all annotation text, titles, captions, flow-chart labels, and summary text rendered in 简体中文 — clear, regular, legible; no romanization, no English, no garbled characters
Constraints: must preserve accurate garment structure, correct component relationships, and culturally accurate pattern / color symbolism for the chosen ethnic group; all text must be 简体中文 only
Avoid: poster aesthetic, portrait-studio feel, e-commerce product-page layout, anime or illustration style, cosplay styling, incorrect structural annotations, blurred or garbled text, fake or generic textures, excessive decorative flourishes

error: {"source":"provider","message":"Your resource has been temporarily blocked because we detected behavior that may violate our content policy.
